creator: olivier@gid0.org
text:
Hello,

----- "Mark Linimon" <linimon@FreeBSD.org> wrote:
> Old Synopsis: local startup scripts are invoked twice

Did you run mergebase.sh after your update, like it's described in ports/UPDATING ?
What did it told you about /etc/defaults/rc.conf ?

Olivier

> New Synopsis: x11/xorg: local startup scripts are invoked twice
